subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ2.1
question_html:
What is the concentration of chloride ions, in mol dm−3, in a solution formed by mixing 200 cm3 of 1 mol dm−3 HCl with 200 cm3 of 5 mol dm−3 NaCl?

A.  1

B.  2

C.  3

D.  6
examiners_html: 52% of the candidates calculated the concentration of chloride ions in the titration. The distractors were chosen almost equally.
